title: Not just for rich people: the progressive case for air conditioning
abstract: This AI tool is not just for the wealthy; it unveils the case for equitable air conditioning. Discover how you can enjoy cool comfort, too, during scorching summers. No need to envy others' air conditioners—take matters into your own hands. Learn more now!
abstract_zh: 这个AI工具可不是富人的专利哦！它帮你揭示空气调节的平权之道，让你也能享受凉爽。酷暑难耐时，别再羡慕别人家的冷气，自己动手，丰衣足食。快来了解一下吧！
